name: Blueberry Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together 1 cup flour, salt, and 2 tablespoons sugar.
2. Add butter to the dry ingredients and blend until a dough forms.
3. Line four 4-1/2 inch tart pans with aluminum foil, allowing at least 1 inch of foil to extend over the pan sides.
4. Press the tart mixture into the bottoms and sides of the pans, shaping it evenly.
5. Crimp the edges to create an even crust.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together 1/2 cup sugar, 1 1/2 tablespoons flour, and ground cinnamon.
7. Stir the cinnamon mixture into the blueberries and divide among the tart pans.
8. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until the crust is golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and carefully peel away the foil.
11. Top each tart with the remaining berries.
12. Sprinkle confectioners' sugar over the fresh fruit.
13. Serve with whipped cream.
